inputs.prompt:
Cinematic interior walkthrough video based on reference image.
Camera slowly dolly-in from entrance into the room with gentle horizontal pan, simulating a person walking into the space.

Keep the same style, lighting, materials, and color palette as the reference image. No style or lighting change.

Subtle spatial outpainting to extend room naturally with correct perspective and geometry.

Smooth, stable motion, no shake, no flicker, no distortion.
Wide-angle cinematic lens, natural depth of field.

End with a wide view of the full interior space.
